---
title: "Mateo Mori"
image: "/Users/mateomoribaez/Downloads/IMG_1684.JPG"
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mateo-mori-1a6351208/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/mateomoribaez-design
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:mateomoribaez@ucsb.edu
---

Hello! I am an environmental science data science and statistics student interested in visualizing the world through R, by learning how websites are made. I enjoy playing water polo, surfing, scuba diving, and backpacking.
